subcodes.title: Words to a physician, spoken on 1912-11-05
subcodes.first_line: My aim is to create harmony and concord among the different groups and to eradicate prejudice, hatred and enmity
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود من الفت بین احزابست و ترک تعصب و ضغینه و بغضا تا ملل و امم عالم با یکدیگر برادر شوند جمیع خیر خواه جنس بشر گردند
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @war and peace, @oneness; unity of religion, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @universal peace; world unity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
